textByHash.ad1817edb10fce75d0babad705c70a6037d15286: It's been lifted? I hadn't realised. I've still been buying water from Ali the Carter!
textByHash.bff6a54ec3995ef07a32a32f49395cd8001cb005: And a good day to you too.
textByHash.c8838e48f2613cc3729157007dad67224d357ec9: Ohh that's because of a curse? I didn't think of that.
